news.title: Govt considering relocation of hill residents: Minister
news.snippet: Government weighs relocating hill families after deadly floods and landslides

news.title: One dengue patient dies, 329 hospitalised in 24hrs

news.title: Govt plans 'secondary city' near Dhaka to ease capital's growing pressure

news.title: Govt plans separate permanent centres for public examinations

news.title: Education minister urges students to end protests, assures re-exams for flood-hit examinees if needed
news.snippet: Students affected by floods or administrative failures during HSC exams will get another chance if needed, he says, assuring that no student will be deprived.

news.title: Hasina's extradition a legal issue, will be dealt with accordingly: India
news.snippet: Bangladesh has more than once written to India seeking Hasina’s extradition to have her face trial in cases, including those filed over alleged crimes against humanity and murders, against her.

news.title: 1.61Cr families to be covered under Family Card scheme by 2030: State minister

news.title: 101 parks to be constructed in country: Housing minister

news.title: Measles-related deaths rise to 766 as seven more children die

news.title: Why HSC candidates are demanding education minister's resignation
news.snippet: The protests stem from the government's decision to continue HSC and equivalent examinations despite widespread flooding, heavy rainfall and waterlogging in several parts of the country.

news.title: Attackers unidentified, no arrests 24 hours after attack on Ctg ISP office

news.title: Four more RMG factories earn LEED certification

news.title: PM assures full govt support for young entrepreneurs to transform economy

news.title: 27 members of 'Chhoto Jahangir Bahini', largest pirate gang of Sundarbans, surrender with arms
news.snippet: Chhoto Jahangir Bahini had long been involved in robbery, kidnapping fishermen and woodcutters, and extorting ransom in the Sundarbans.

news.title: Overseas education scam: Just Thought consultancy owner arrested while trying to leave country

news.title: HSC exams to continue despite adverse weather; DCs can act over safety risks

news.title: BB extends Foreign Currency-Taka swap facility to exporters in specialised economic zones

news.title: Govt steps up talks with BRICS bank, multilateral lenders for budget support
news.snippet: The finance minister says the government is seeking concessional financing to ease pressure on foreign exchange reserves and ensure funding for priority development projects.

news.title: DU postpones all exams scheduled for Monday amid adverse weather

news.title: Cash incentive for domestic textile exports raised to 5%

news.title: HSC candidates clash at Bhola exam centre, vandalise college; 7 injured
